case_for: Taylor has shown real upside recently, posting 18.8 and 17.7 points in two of his last three outings, suggesting he can pop for a big game if given enough volume or a favorable script.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 6.1 points reflects a limited, low-ceiling role (likely a backup or spot-starter situation), and his floor games (0.5, 3.6, 6.1) show how quickly he can flame out if the offense sputters or he's pulled early.
